arts.sum: We predict that Spurs could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Forster; Gray, Dragusin, Davies, Udogie; Sarr, Bissouma, Maddison; Kulusevski, Solanke, Son. In added time, the hosts thought they had snatched three points later on when Marco Senesi headed home at the back post following a late cross into the box, but the goal was swiftly ruled out for offside – a let-off for Spurs.
